document.title: Move & Immigration hub
document.description: Hub for moving guidance, core pages, and deterministic tools.

body.raw: This hub links the pillar, guide pages, and tools.

document.title: Moving to the Netherlands
document.description: Practical pillar guide for planning a smooth move to the Netherlands.

body.raw:
## Start with a calm plan

Use the moving hub to map your timeline. Prioritize identity docs, address setup, BSN registration, and insurance checkpoints.

## Before you move

Prepare a document pack early. Confirm validity periods and keep certified copies where needed.

## First 30 days

Focus on registration milestones and practical setup. Keep a simple tracker for appointments and document follow-ups.

## First 90 days

Transition from setup into stable routines. Review what changed and close any open admin loops.

document.title: BSN registration
document.description: Step-by-step BSN setup guidance for new arrivals.

body.raw:
## Why BSN matters

You need a BSN for many core systems in the Netherlands.

## What to prepare

Bring ID, address details, and supporting civil-status documents where relevant.

## Appointment flow

Book, confirm, and keep records of submissions and confirmations.
